title: Application - Fresh install mobile application
scenario: Fresh install of Poly Studio Mobile app from Play Store completes successfully and onboarding process can be started
steps: 1. Uninstall the Poly Studio Mobile app from the Android device if previously installed.
2. Open the Google Play Store on the Android device.
3. Search for "Poly Studio Mobile" and select the app from the search results.
4. Tap "Install" and wait for the installation to complete.
5. Tap "Open" to launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe the initial launch screen and verify that the onboarding process begins (e.g., welcome screen, permission requests, or device pairing prompt).
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app installs successfully from the Play Store, launches without errors, and the user is presented with the onboarding process (e.g., welcome screen, permission prompts, or device setup flow).
